rule: Do not mark resolved without live evidence. Missing credentials, APIs, secrets, runners, or approvals are HARD_GATE, not resolved.

blockers.required_action: Configure OAuth client, consent, refresh token, send/calendar allowlists through approved secret channel.
blockers.next_test: connector dry-run returns authenticated read-only profile/calendar scope receipt.

blockers.required_action: Provide Metricool API key, brand ID, and profile allowlist through approved secret channel.
blockers.next_test: dry-run reads brand/profile metadata and refuses live publish.

blockers.required_action: Configure webhook or bot plus target space ID through approved secret channel.
blockers.next_test: dry-run validates route and blocks send without approval.

blockers.required_action: Configure n8n base URL, API key, webhook secret, and harmless test workflow.
blockers.next_test: dry-run signs payload and receives harmless echo receipt.

blockers.required_action: Approve a browser runner with preview access and screenshot receipt storage.
blockers.next_test: capture screenshots for /api/bridge/registry and frontend bridge page.

blockers.required_action: Run authenticated local relay and configure URL/token through approved channel.
blockers.next_test: heartbeat, git status, harmless read, harmless command receipts.

blockers.required_action: Create hardening packet, review RLS/policies/functions, then approve dev-branch migration before writes.
blockers.next_test: read-only schema/advisor receipt and dev-branch migration receipt.

blockers.required_action: Explicit approval per mutation class and connector widening step.
Deploy preview branch and smoke registry, connector status, dry-run, execute-approved, unblock scan routes.
blockers.next_test: all listed GET/POST routes return receipt-backed responses with mutation=false unless approved.
